text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: What's got you in such a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The flowers I've been growing bloomed recently.
They're really pretty.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ I'll show them to you sometime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something nice happened on Nishino Flower's
day off, and she's feeling great as a result!
